brand_identity.name: Built.For.You
brand_identity.emotion: Bespoke, elite, disciplined, cinematic, technical precision
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine elite sports photography with Swiss editorial typography.
Emotion First: The UI should feel like a high-end locker room or professional coaching terminal.
Contrast: Deepest obsidian black backgrounds punctuated by neon volt accents and pure white text.
App-First Feel: The generated apps must feel native, using fixed bottom navigation, horizontal day-scrolling, and edge-to-edge imagery.
No Generic Fitness Tropes: Avoid basic blue/purple gradients or basic card layouts. Use pure black or 1px border grid layouts.

rules.headings: Tracking-tight to tracking-tighter. Use font-black or font-extrabold. No Inter for headings.

sizes.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-12 for section paddings.
layout.marketing_page: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for sample apps. Swiss Grid for text features. Aggressive asymmetry.
layout.app_interface: Mobile-first layout. Max width on desktop (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto for the app simulator). Sticky top headers, fixed bottom navs. Edge-to-edge list items.
layout.corners: Sharp (rounded-none) or highly subtle (rounded-sm - 2px) to maintain the technical, professional vibe.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4FF00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#b8e600] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4
buttons.app_cta: w-full bg-[#D4FF00] text-black font-bold py-4 text-center rounded-none shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,255,0,0.3)]

cards.marketing: Grid Borders style: border-r border-b border-white/10 flat backgrounds, no shadows.
cards.app_workout_card: bg-[#121212] border-l-4 border-[#D4FF00] p-4 flex justify-between items-center

navigation.marketing_header: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50.
navigation.app_bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-[#050505]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-white/10 flex justify-around py-4 z-50

forms.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 rounded-none focus:border-[#D4FF00] focus:ring-0 text-white placeholder-white/30 px-0 py-2

motion.scroll: Use lenis for smooth scrolling on the marketing page.
motion.transitions: hover states must have transition-all duration-200 ease-out.
motion.interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on active (active:scale-[0.98]).

hero.layout: Full viewport height. Background image with bg-black/50 to bg-black/70 gradient overlay. Massive H1 typography.
hero.content: Headline: 'Your training plan. Built as an app. In minutes.' Primary CTA + secondary text.

social_proof.layout: Editorial Marquee or clean grid strip with small uppercase text and checkmarks.

how_it_works.layout: 3-column tall grid. Huge numbers (01, 02, 03) in a technical mono font.

sample_apps.layout: Horizontal scroll container on mobile, 3-column bento on desktop. Each acts as a portal/link to the actual app views.

pricing_b2b.layout: High contrast section. Split view: Left side B2C (£4.99), Right side B2B (Waitlist).

sample_training_apps.global: Simulate a mobile app environment. If viewed on desktop, wrap the app content in a 'phone' container (max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen border-x border-white/10).

football_app.special_feature: Segmented Control / Tabs for Off-season, Pre-season, In-season at the top. This changes the workout list content.

views.dashboard: Horizontal days scroll. Vertical list of today's workouts, nutrition goals, and recovery scores.
views.workout_detail: Edge-to-edge video/image header, list of exercises with sets/reps.
views.nutrition: Macro progress bars (using Volt Green). Meal list.
views.recovery: Sleep/Strain metrics using minimalist circular progress or typography-heavy stats.

hero_background.description: Determined man working out in a gym in Cape Town, cinematic lighting.

sample_app_football.description: Male football player kicking ball in a dark stadium.

sample_app_longevity.description: Senior man stretching in a modern gym.

sample_app_athlete.description: Man climbing a rope in a dimly lit gym.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='sample-app-toggle').
